name_en: Chanel 24s Hula Hoop is a must-buy black and gold item😎 This one really offers great value, the bag is very light, and the chain is even lighter. The cute bow is truly versatile😍😍😍 The bag capacity is absolutely amazing, can fit an iPhone Pro Max🥹🥹🥹 I DIY'd a pearl chain + vintage gold buckle to turn it into a dual-use cute bag😍😍😍 Black and gold calfskin is worth a rush...... Looking forward to the same style pink hula hoop and Tangyuan Pearl mini CF, pearlescent pink, the real thing
